song.title: Nearest Of All Is He Is
song.author: David M. Panton
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Nearest of all is He, Dearest of all to me; Mine in life’s lowly ways, Mine in life’s common days.
[V2] 2) True, in the time of care, Fairest, when all is fair, Strength of my helplessness, Always at hand to bless.
[V3] 3) Secret of joy untold, Changeless, as years unfold; Nearest of all is He; Dearest of all to me!
